title: Catppuccin UI
description: A soothing pastel UI-Pack for Minecraft based on the Catppuccin colour scheme. ⛏️
body:
## About Catppuccin UI is a Minecraft resource pack that is based on the Catppuccin colour theme and focuses on theming Minecraft GUI. Catppuccin theme consists of 4 beautiful pastel colour palettes, named flavors. Read more about Catppuccin [here](https://github.com/catppuccin/catppuccin#readme).

## Why to use Catppuccin UI? - Catppuccin theme consists of 4 different flavors and each flavor has 14 accent colors to choose from. Don't know which flavor and accent color to use? [See all four colour palettes](https://catppuccin.com/palette) - All Minecraft versions from 1.6.1 to 1.21.10 are supported. Also, many mods are supported, see the full list in section [Supported mods](#supported_mods). - It's not just a resource pack. Catppuccin theme is available for many programs and sites. There's one even for Modrinth. See [All Catppuccin ports](https://catppuccin.com/ports) and [Catppuccin for Modrinth](https://github.com/catppuccin/userstyles/tree/main/styles/modrinth). ## Usage 1. Go to [versions page](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/catppuccin-ui/versions) and click on the version with your preferred flavor and the Minecraft version you're playing. 2. Scroll down to the "Files" section and download `Catppuccin {flavor} {accent color}.zip` zip file with your preferred accent color. 3. Move that zip file you downloaded to the `resourcepacks` folder within your `.minecraft` directory (or your Minecraft profile folder, depending on your installation). 4. Launch Minecraft and open the resource packs menu from the options. 5. Select the pack and press done. > Updating is recommended to be done manually following steps above. Some launchers allow updating resourcepacks automatically, it is not recommended for this resourcepack. Launchers can't detect correct version due to the way different versions of all flavors/accent colors are managed.

Supported mods

> Adding support for new mods in Catppuccin UI is temporarily paused. I plan to add support for more mods in future, so feel free to make mod support requests. Feel free to create an issue on our [GitHub issues page](https://github.com/catppuccin/minecraft/issues) if you encounter a mod that isn't supported yet or have any suggestions.
List of supported mods. Click to expand. Last update to this list was made on December 5, 2024. [ALL] = All Minecraft versions that the mod & this resource pack supports. | Mod name (A-Z) | Minecraft versions | Known issues/additional info | Added in | | ------------- | ------------- | ------------- | ------------- | | [AdvancementInfo](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancementinfo) | [ALL] | Info panel background color is wrong. | v1.1.0 | | [Alloy Forgery](https://modrinth.com/mod/alloy-forgery) | [ALL] | | v1.3.0 | | [AppleCore](https://github.com/squeek502/AppleCore) | [ALL] | | v1.1.0 | | [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) | [ALL] | | v1.1.0 | | [Auth Me](https://modrinth.com/mod/auth-me) | [ALL] | | v1.0.0 | | [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) | [ALL] | Wrong text color used in many places.
